title: The City That Never Sleeps
shortDescription: An empty metropolis that serves as the Backrooms' main hub: self-sustaining infrastructure, many faction settlements and countless exits.
atmosphere: Sprawling urban emptiness of working buildings, zones bleeding into one another, oddly pacifying to hostile entities.
tips: Mark safe routes with paint. Avoid unmapped areas near exits. Seek work for housing in the Capital and ask locals for directions.

title: Matrix
shortDescription: A self-censoring level that blurs all recordings. A single furnished room expands into an infinite white void scattered with furniture.
atmosphere: Stark white emptiness that fogs the mind and erodes memory; peaceful yet disorienting, reality fraying with distance from the center.
tips: Sit in the original chair ~15 min, try the locked door, enter the copycat door, return, wait exactly one hour, then try the door again.

title: The Boiling Frogs
shortDescription: A 290-floor apartment complex of bland halls and identical furnished rooms that quietly nudges long-term residents into lethargy and withdrawal.
atmosphere: Monotonous, suffocating comfort; dim endless hallways and apartments giving just enough to make leaving psychologically hard.
tips: Keep social ties and routines outside your room. The level's lethargy deepens isolation — seek work or a group to resist stagnation.

title: Paradise
shortDescription: A dreamlike forest realm that lures wanderers into a collective consciousness, absorbing their minds and making escape all but impossible.
atmosphere: Serene yet wrong: starlit skies, waterfalls and crimson grass masking a parasitic hive-mind that hungers to assimilate.
tips: Do not read the wall inscriptions. Resist the peaceful pull urging you to surrender to the collective.

title: Futuristic Halls
shortDescription: A vast industrial complex of futuristic hallways full of strange machinery, abandoned laboratories and corpses in lab coats.
atmosphere: Eerie desolate facility, engine sounds echoing through white concrete corridors under unsettling artificial light.
tips: Explore cautiously and avoid the mysterious doorframe in the empty engine room. Watch your mental health on long stays.

title: Altered Topography
shortDescription: A level whose terrain rapidly transforms between ecosystems, currently a frozen arctic of luminous ice and unpredictable topography.
atmosphere: Hazardous and unstable: an arctic landscape that reshapes without warning, threatening sudden geological and environmental shifts.
tips: Never linger during an environmental shift. The exit moves with each transformation — don't get boxed in by changing terrain.

title: (page unavailable)
shortDescription: Source page returned HTTP 404 at fetch time; kept as a stub so cross-references resolve. Data to be filled on a re-fetch.

title: Memories
shortDescription: A personalized childhood-memory realm that manifests differently for each visitor, laced with whispering voices and nostalgic imagery.
atmosphere: Emotionally evocative and introspective; recreates formative spaces with a melancholy that resurfaces forgotten memories.
tips: No physical danger. Simply turn around and leave to reach Level 19. Following the Plush Dino can guide you, though slowly.

title: Attic Floorboards
shortDescription: A dilapidated attic of dusty furniture and boxes, with an alluring orange glow under the floorboards that alters memory and rots matter.
atmosphere: Musty and oppressive clutter of vintage items; a warm inviting glow feigns comfort while eroding the mind.
tips: Avoid prolonged exposure to the orange glow. Items decay fast once removed from containers. Expect hallucinations and memory loss.

title: Boreas Structure
shortDescription: An amusement facility split into the Waiting Halls (lockers, vending) and the Electric (deadly game rooms), bitterly cold and paranoia-inducing.
atmosphere: Eerie artificially-lit amusement palace sinking into darkness and extreme cold, with breathing/wind hallucinations and phantom snow.
tips: Don't read expedition logs before entry. Use staff-only doors in the Waiting Halls to exit fast. Win games for supplies; losing teleports you.
